SYSTEM PLANNER
- Complexity: mvp
- Systems: billing, tools, dashboard, storage, auth, settings, ai_tools, admin
- Frontend: React + Vite app shell
- Backend: FastAPI or Node API with dedicated service endpoints
- Auth: Protected routes + session tokens
- Data: Local persistence first, ready to upgrade to DB/API
- Feature bundles: Billing bundle → plan cards, paywall, subscription actions | Tools bundle → calculators, workflows, result pages | Dashboard bundle → home summary, stats, recent activity | Storage bundle → saved items, history, local/API persistence | Auth bundle → login view, route guards, account state | Settings bundle → preferences, profile, environment values | AI tools bundle → prompts, chat/scan flow, AI endpoint wiring | Admin bundle → operator pages, roles, team workflows

simple_draft.mainGoal: Answer questions, call tools, and guide the user

architecture.backend: FastAPI or Node API with dedicated service endpoints
architecture.data: Local persistence first, ready to upgrade to DB/API

bundles: Billing bundle → plan cards, paywall, subscription actions
Tools bundle → calculators, workflows, result pages
Dashboard bundle → home summary, stats, recent activity
Storage bundle → saved items, history, local/API persistence
Auth bundle → login view, route guards, account state
Settings bundle → preferences, profile, environment values
AI tools bundle → prompts, chat/scan flow, AI endpoint wiring
Admin bundle → operator pages, roles, team workflows

# Generated App

## App type
admin panel

## Systems
billing, tools, dashboard, storage, auth, settings, ai_tools, admin

## Persistence
supabase

## Frontend
```bash
cd frontend
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Backend
```bash
cd backend
pip install -r requirements.txt
uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
```
